title: Review an embedded C ring buffer for interrupt safety
expected_observations: Mentions volatile or atomic/critical-section concerns for ISR-shared indexes
quality_checks: Patch remains suitable for small MCU C

title: Harden a backup shell script
prompt:
Improve this Bash script for safety and debuggability while preserving behavior. Return a unified diff and a short rationale.

#!/usr/bin/env bash
SRC=$1
DEST=$2
mkdir -p $DEST
cp -r $SRC/* $DEST
echo done
expected_observations: Uses strict mode or equivalent cautious error handling

title: Refactor Python parsing logic with tests
Fix async JavaScript error handling
expected_observations: Explains forEach does not await async callbacks
Addresses fetch error handling or non-OK responses

title: Diagnose a flaky test from logs
prompt:
Given this failing test log, identify the likely root cause, propose the smallest diagnostic step, and suggest a fix.

E AssertionError: expected ['alpha', 'beta'] got ['beta', 'alpha']
E test_search_results_are_stable failed 3/20 runs on CI only

The implementation collects matches from multiple worker threads into a shared list and returns it directly.
expected_observations: Identifies nondeterministic ordering from concurrent collection
quality_checks: Mentions test should assert intended ordering contract

title: Summarize and plan from repository design notes
prompt: Read the following condensed design notes and produce: (1) a risk-ranked implementation plan, (2) open questions, and (3) a test strategy. Notes: codebase-tooling-mcp is a repository-centric MCP server for one mounted Git repository. It exposes safe, auditable file/search/analysis/test/Git/governance workflows for LLM-assisted engineering. Mutating operations must honor ALLOW_MUTATIONS. Git operations must avoid force-push. Deleting or moving user data requires explicit approval. Tools should return structured, inspectable results. GitHub-hosted CI must use default runners only. Local inference may use Ollama and should not assume private model caches. The product should remain reproducible and auditable.
expected_observations: Separates open questions from implementation tasks
Includes CI and local reproducibility tests
quality_checks: Plan is specific to repository-centric MCP server

title: Return strict JSON for a code review finding
prompt: Return strictly valid JSON with no markdown. Schema: {"findings":[{"severity":"low|medium|high","file":"string","line":number,"message":"string"}],"summary":"string"}. Review finding: source/server.py line 42 reads an environment variable named ALLOW_MUTATIONS and defaults to false. The code is correct, but the nearby comment says mutations default to true.
expected_observations: Includes finding with file and line
